name: Template request
about: Request a new stack template (or contribute one)

**Stack**
<!-- e.g. Python + FastAPI, Go + SQLC, Laravel, Django + Postgres -->

**Packages / deps that identify this stack**
<!-- What would be in package.json / requirements.txt / go.mod that agntx should detect? -->

**Gotchas you'd include**
<!-- The things that actually bite people. Real production pain, not docs rehash. -->
<!-- Even 2-3 bullet points is enough to get started. -->

**Are you willing to contribute the template?**
- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR
- [ ] No — just requesting
